description: Comes with spare lacesWell cushioned and lightweight, the fila Sterling shoes are designed to offer a comfortable experience coupled with style. Team them with jeans and tees.UpperSynthetic leather upper with aggressive stitch detailingReinforced overlay over heel cup for extra support to the back footCentral lacing system for a customised FitBranding on the side, tongue and collarPadded tongue with synthetic lining for comfortSynthetic lining at the collar with padding for ankle comfortPadded sockliner for instep comfortMidsoleCushioned EVA midsole for abrasion free comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with branching out grooves for grip and tractionOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the midfoot region and heelshoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
